metaphor: Piano keys - sharp vertical lines, stark black and white contrast, pure functional whitespace.

headings.usage_rules: Use tracking-tight for H1 and H2. Never center by default. Represents the bold 'black keys' of the piano.

body.usage_rules: Clean legibility, use leading-relaxed for body text.

mono.usage_rules: Use for metadata, dates, file sizes, and search tags. tracking-tight, uppercase for labels.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-bold text-[#0A0A0A]
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-[#0A0A0A]

rules: NO DARK MODE. Rimuovi completamente qualsiasi logica o plugin Tailwind per la dark mode.
NO PURPLE. NO TEAL. NO GRADIENTS.
Use #0A0A0A for primary buttons and CTAs to represent the black piano keys.
Use #FEF08A for highlighting search query matches in results and for the backup warning banner.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. Empty areas act as the 'white keys'. Minimalist structural boundaries.
spacing_and_layout.page_wrapper: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 py-12 md:py-24

grids.bento_search: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8. Search hero takes col-span-full.
grids.pdf_list: flex flex-col gap-0 border-t border-b border-[#E5E5E5]

surfaces.cards: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-none md:rounded-sm shadow-none. No heavy shadows. Sharp geometric feel.
surfaces.search_bar: bg-[#FFFFFF] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-md shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#0A0A0A] focus-within:shadow-none focus-within:translate-y-1 transition-all
surfaces.dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-[#A3A3A3] bg-[#FAFAFA] hover:bg-[#F5F5F5] rounded-md transition-colors p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center

navigation.style: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#FFFFFF]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E5E5] px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center.

search_hero.concept: Mix tra Google Search (input centrale gigante) e Linear (rapidità, key-bindings, bordi netti).
search_hero.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[40vh] w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto gap-8
search_hero.input: w-full text-2xl md:text-4xl py-6 px-8 outline-none font-medium placeholder:text-[#A3A3A3] text-center md:text-left

pdf_list_item.style: group flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-[#E5E5E5] hover:bg-[#FAFAFA] transition-colors cursor-pointer
pdf_list_item.title: text-lg font-medium text-[#0A0A0A] group-hover:underline decoration-2 underline-offset-4

pdf_viewer.style: Inline viewer in page. Container: bg-[#F5F5F5] p-8 flex justify-center border border-[#E5E5E5]. Document: bg-white shadow-md.

warning_banner.style: bg-[#FEF08A] text-[#854D0E] px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium flex justify-center items-center border-b border-[#FDE047]

forms.inputs: Shadcn based. border border-[#E5E5E5] bg-[#FAFAFA] px-4 py-3 rounded-sm focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#0A0A0A] focus-visible:border-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors

motion.hover: Subtle background color changes and sharp border color changes. No bouncy effects.
motion.focus: High contrast ring or border change.
motion.page_transitions: Instant or subtle fade. Priority is SPEED (Google Search fast).

guidelines: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

images.description: Abstract minimalist architectural composition resembling piano keys for the login/register split screen. High visual impact.
Minimal classical sheet music for empty library state or search background.
Black and white piano keys, ideal for a default cover or user profile banner.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, strict black #0A0A0A. Clean and minimal.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Inject the provided CDN links for Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi, and JetBrains Mono into the main CSS/HTML file.
2. Configure tailwind.config.js to use these fonts, and STRICTLY remove any dark mode configurations.
3. Build the frontend completely in Italian ('Accedi', 'Registrati', 'Libreria', 'Impostazioni', etc.).
4. For the Notion/Linear look, avoid standard heavy drop shadows on cards. Use 1px #E5E5E5 borders with flat white backgrounds.
5. The home search should be massive (text-4xl input) and centered. Think Google Search but designed by a Swiss typographer.
6. Include the persistent warning banner at the top of the app if backup is OFF, using the yellow highlight color.
7. Implement Shadcn/UI for complex elements (Dialogs, Dropdowns, Forms) but strip out Vercel-like styles to match our sharp, high-contrast, cardless aesthetics.
8. Always apply data-testid to every interactive UI component for testing.
